name: ledger-wallet-cli
description: Codex safety harness for the official @ledgerhq/wallet-cli command contract.

interface.shortDescription: Run hardware-wallet CLI flows with Codex safety rails.
interface.longDescription: Adds Codex instructions and a hardened local harness for the official @ledgerhq/wallet-cli 1.0.2 contract: JSON output parsing, strict flag handling, dry-run-first send rails, and a clear separation from AgenC DMK/BLE marketplace flows. This is an independent local plugin and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Ledger.
